Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

snippet.title: Shrek 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027.
______
 
Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.  
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of Shrek fan-favorite Gingerbread Man, aka “Gingy,” across all titles in the Shrek Universe. Dohrn worked on the second and third Shrek films as a writer and artist and as Head of Story on the fourth film. Dohrn also voiced the character of Rumpelstiltskin in Shrek Forever After. Dohrn served as co-director on the first Trolls film and directed Trolls World Tour and Trolls Band Together. 

The film is produced by returning producer Gina Shay (Trolls franchise), who produced Shrek Forever After and by Illumination CEO and Academy Award® nominee Chris Meledandri (the Super Mario, Despicable Me and Minions franchises). The film is co-directed by Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons).

Social Handles

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Shrek/

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Dlala Thukzin & Sun-El Musician | Red Bull Symphonic 2026 | Full Performance (Afro House, Our Home)
snippet.description:
Watch Red Bull Symphonic 2026 performance. Dlala Thukzin & Sun-El Musician perform live with Maestro Chad Hendricks & The Symphonic Orchestra in Johannesburg, South Africa. This genre-defining edition of Red Bull Symphonic, is an unprecedented collaboration between contemporary artists, a classical music director & a full-scale symphonic orchestra. Straight out of Lamontville, Durban, Dlala Thukzin brought his firepower alongside house visionary Sun-El Musician.

Event Details
Event: Red Bull Symphonic 2026
Theme: Afro House, Our Home
Headliners: Dlala Thukzin & Sun-El Musician
Conductor: Maestro Chad Hendricks
Orchestra & Choir: Full symphonic orchestra, Vocal Hue choir & Blakkville
Venue: Montecasino, Johannesburg, South Africa
Date: 13&14 June 2026 (sold out)
Broadcast: Live on SABC1
Genres: Afro House, House Music, Amapiano, Gqom

Ilembe
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Mnqobi Lindokuhle Msimango. Performed by Sun-El Musician & Mnqobi Yazo. Courtesy of Under Da Sun, Mnqobi Yazo

Bamthathile
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Lindokuhle Mgedezi, Simphiwe Majobe Nhlangulela. Performed by Sun-El Musician & Mlindo The Vocalist. Courtesy of El World Music, Sony Music Publishing South Africa

Koyika
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Siphosethu Siziwe Precious Koom, Amahle Xoliswa Pretty Koom. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Sai Hle, Jude Harpstar & Malane Hofmer- Burger. Courtesy of Under Da Sun, Sai Hle

Muloro
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Mavhungu Muenda, Silent Themba Mukiwa, Thabang Mathebula. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Mavhungu & Sibusiso Nkwanyana. Courtesy of Under Da Sun

Angeke
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Thato Raphadi, Keanen L Beeker, Lesego Junior Nkooe. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Thatohatsi, Urbano Bay Nobela, Leeroy Sauls & Sibusiso Nkwanyana. Courtesy of Under Da Sun, Universal Music Publishing, Sony Music Publishing South Africa

Insimbi
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Njabulo Mthunzi Ndimande. Performed by Mthunzi & Sun-El Musician. Courtesy of El World Music

The Rise
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Gift Mpho Mohlong, Chaliton Ndlovu. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Alex Hitzeroth & Urbano Bay Nobel. Courtesy of Under Da Sun, Charl Musiq

Mpumelelo
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Ayabonga Zuma, Sabelo Nala, Kgotso Dube. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Kabza De Small, Sykes, Limit Nala & Thukuthela, Neo Buthelezi &  Motswane Pege. Courtesy of 031 Studio Camp, 462 Group, Mokima Music & Publishing, EMPIRE

Umngan'wami (feat.Mampintsha)
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Bongekile Simelane, Mandla Maphumulo. Performed by Babes Wodumo, Mampintsha, Olga Maraba, Kathlego Raditlhalo, Tiisetso Mashishi & Neo Buthelezi. Courtesy of West Ink Records, Lekadimo Holdings, 462 Group

Ama Gear
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Sphamandla Qiniso Ngema, Mpumelelo Khumalo, Zandile Ndhlovu. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Funky Qla, Zee Nxumalo, MK Productions & Sibusiso Nkwanyana. Courtesy of Dlala Records & Funko Media, 462 Group, Africori Music Group, Africa Creative Publishing, Candor Music Services

Mali
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Zandile Ndhlovu, Ayabonga Zuma
Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Zee Nxumalo, Sykes & Tino Jason Damba. Courtesy of 031 Studio Camp, 462 Group, Africa Creative Publishing, Mokima Music & Publishing

iPlan
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Ayabonga Zuma, Wonder Mngwengwe. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Zaba, Sykes, Motswane Pege & Leeroy Sauls. Courtesy of Dlala Records, 462 Group, Mokima Music & Publishing

Phuze
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Wonder Mngwengwe. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Zaba & Thulani Mahloko. Courtesy of Dlala Records, 462 Group

Ungenzani
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Mpumelelo Khumalo, Cebo Nxazonke. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, MK Productions, Blaq Seed & Lebo Pangwa. Courtesy of Dlala Records, 462 Group, Candor Music Services

Sonini
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Simphiwe Majobe Nhlangulela, Amanda M. Ngcobo. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Simmy, Urbano Bay Nobela, Motswane Pege, Leeroy Sauls & Tino Jason Damba. Courtesy of El World Music

Uvalo
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Kamohelo Monese, Kgotso Dube, Babalwa Sybil Mavuso. Performed by JAZZWRLD, Thukuthela, Babalwa M & Dlala Thukzin. Courtesy of EMPIRE, Africori Music Group, 462 Group

Ubomi Abumanga
Written by Sanele T. Sithole, Asanda Msaki Mvana. Performed by Sun-El Musician, Msaki & Jude Harpstar. Courtesy of El World Music, Universal Music Publishing

Sohlala Sisonke
Written by Thuthuka Wandile Zindlovu, Sabelo Zulu, Mpumelelo Khumalo. Performed by Dlala Thukzin, Zeh McGeba & MK Productions. Courtesy of Dlala Records, 462 Group, Candor Music Services

Well-known characters, when featured, appear within entirely new story situations and serve as familiar visual touchpoints — a convention widely used across modern animation, comic books, and digital entertainment.
